query:
SELECT id, poNumber, backupLabel, productCount, createdAt, restoredAt, restoredByUserId
FROM import_batch_backups
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-10 00:00:00'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT id, poNumber, backupLabel, productCount, createdAt, restoredAt, restoredByUserId
FROM import_batch_backups
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-10 00:00:00'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
